anime_pulse_items.title: One Piece Chapter 1130: Straw Hats vs. Holy Knights Clash in Elbaf
anime_pulse_items.summary: The latest chapter reveals the Holy Knights' invasion of Elbaf, with Luffy and the crew facing off against a new, formidable enemy. The chapter ends with a shocking betrayal, setting up the next major arc. Fans are speculating about the identity of the masked knight.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note: New Anime Adaptation Announced for 2027
anime_pulse_items.summary: Studio MAPPA announced a new Death Note anime series, promising a modern retelling with updated animation and expanded storylines. The announcement came with a teaser trailer showing a new Shinigami. Fans are divided on the need for a remake.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3: Hidden Inventory Arc Adaptation Confirmed
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll confirms Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 will adapt the Hidden Inventory arc, focusing on Gojo's past. The season is set for a Fall 2026 release. Fans are hyped for the return of young Gojo and Geto.

anime_pulse_items.title: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle Movie Trilogy Breaks Box Office Records
anime_pulse_items.summary: The first Infinity Castle movie grossed over $500 million worldwide, becoming the highest-grossing anime film of 2026. The second movie is set for August release. Fans praise the animation and emotional depth.

anime_pulse_items.title: Attack on Titan: The Final Chapters Post-Finale Discussion Explodes
anime_pulse_items.summary: Months after the finale, fan theories about the ending's implications continue to dominate Reddit. A new spin-off manga focusing on Levi's journey is announced. The fandom remains deeply engaged.

anime_pulse_items.title: Naruto: Boruto Manga Chapter 80 Reveals Code's Final Form
anime_pulse_items.summary: Boruto Chapter 80 showcases Code's ultimate transformation, leading to a massive battle with Naruto and Sasuke. The chapter ends with a cliffhanger involving Kawaki's betrayal. Fans are speculating on the fate of the original team.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball: Sparking! ZERO Game Update Adds New Characters
anime_pulse_items.summary: The latest free update for Dragon Ball: Sparking! ZERO adds Ultra Instinct Goku and Full Power Jiren, along with a new tournament mode. The update is available now on all platforms. Fans are thrilled with the roster.

anime_pulse_items.title: My Hero Academia Manga Ending in 5 Chapters, Final Arc Revealed
anime_pulse_items.summary: Weekly Shonen Jump announces My Hero Academia will end in 5 chapters, with the final arc titled 'The Last Stand'. The series concludes after 10 years. Fans are emotional and speculating on Deku's fate.

anime_pulse_items.title: Chainsaw Man Season 2 Release Date Set for October 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: Chainsaw Man Season 2 will premiere on October 10, 2026, adapting the Bomb Girl arc. A new trailer shows Denji and Asa's first encounter. Fans are buzzing about the animation quality.

anime_pulse_items.title: Spy x Family Season 3 Premieres Next Week, New Key Visual Released
anime_pulse_items.summary: Spy x Family Season 3 premieres on May 25, 2026, with a new key visual featuring the Forgers in a beach setting. The season promises new missions and character development. Fans are excited for more family antics.

anime_pulse_items.title: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End Wins Anime of the Year at Crunchyroll Awards
anime_pulse_items.summary: Frieren took home Anime of the Year at the 2026 Crunchyroll Awards, along with Best Fantasy and Best Score. The series' emotional storytelling and animation were praised. Season 2 hype is at an all-time high.

anime_pulse_items.title: Solo Leveling Season 2: New Trailer Shows Jeju Island Arc
anime_pulse_items.summary: Solo Leveling Season 2 trailer reveals the Jeju Island arc with stunning visuals and new character designs. The season is set for a July 2026 release. Fans are comparing the anime to the manhwa.

anime_pulse_items.title: Netflix Announces Live-Action One Piece Season 2 Casting
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix confirms casting for One Piece live-action season 2, including new actors for Chopper and Robin. Filming is set to begin in June. Fans are cautiously optimistic after season 1's success.

anime_pulse_items.title: Crunchyroll Adds 10 New Anime Simulcasts for Summer 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll announces 10 new simulcasts for Summer 2026, including 'The Rising of the Shield Hero' Season 4 and 'Mushoku Tensei' Season 3. The lineup also features new originals. Fans are excited for the variety.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note Musical Adaptation Coming to Broadway in 2027
anime_pulse_items.summary: A Death Note musical, produced by Netflix, is set to premiere on Broadway in 2027. The musical will feature songs from the original Japanese production and new compositions. Fans are intrigued by the crossover.

anime_pulse_items.title: Reddit Community Ranks Top 100 Anime of All Time, Controversy Ensues
anime_pulse_items.summary: The r/anime subreddit released their annual top 100 list, with 'Attack on Titan' taking #1, sparking debates about 'Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood' being snubbed. The thread has 50k+ comments.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball Daima: First Episode Leaks Online, Toei Issues Takedowns
anime_pulse_items.summary: The first episode of Dragon Ball Daima leaked on streaming sites, prompting Toei to issue copyright takedowns. The episode shows a young Goku on a new adventure. Fans are divided on watching leaks vs waiting.

anime_pulse_items.title: My Hero Academia: Vigilantes Spin-Off Gets Anime Adaptation
anime_pulse_items.summary: My Hero Academia spin-off 'Vigilantes' is getting an anime adaptation by Bones, set for a 2027 release. The series focuses on underground heroes. Fans are excited for a darker take on the universe.
